subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden and My leaf! Thou hast been remembered before the Wronged One and art not forgotten. Today the glance of loving-kindness is directed towards the handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی و ورقتی ذکرت لدی المظلوم بوده فراموش نشده امروز لحاظ عنایت متوجه اماء
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
